reviews.author: shivam mishra
reviews.review_body: You can't connect with mvn sector 17. They don't pick up the phone.

reviews.author: Ashish Dixit
reviews.review_body: Educated and dedicated teachers, highly disciplined atmosphere, very professional management, space for games and activities however tution fees are too much. Very Expensive education.

reviews.author: SAURABH DHAMIJA
reviews.review_body: Some teachers are very good like ashima mam,Kavita mam,MONIKA HINDI MAM, BUT THE STORY ENDS HERE ONLY EXCEPT THESE TEACHERS ALL ARE VERY RUDE OR EVEN NOT RUDE BUT BAD BECAUSE THEY ONLY SUPPORT GOOD STUDENTS IN THE CLASS THERE IS NO VALUE OF A AVERAGE AND BAD STUDENT IN CLASS THERE IS SO MUCH INEQUALITY LIKE A INTELLIGENT kid hit a average student but they will not scold him because he is intelligent. Half of the time there is no robotics calls for us it can be anyday not mentioned in the time table than sir says us why you are not carrying robotics notebook with you and for badminton they don't have  specific Court it is in stage please improve please and bathrooms are also smelly and not clean you says but not do it and specially the English teacher shweta mam is never taking equality in class she just select some  students and for her the average students are a piece of dirt and she is very angry as well as sst geo Dolly mam also same goes to her

reviews.author: Abhishek Mittal
reviews.review_body: MVN helps in the holistic development of the students with its playway cum activity-based learning and innovative curriculum.

reviews.author: Sagar Kumar
reviews.review_body: One of the best school for education in Faridabad

reviews.author: Sanjay Kumar
reviews.review_body: Undoubtedly, MVN is reputed to be the best school in Faridabad. The school has always been bringing in the change for the betterment of students since inception and I have found them to be always good.

reviews.author: Rahul Sharma
reviews.review_body: This is one of the Best Schools of Faridabad under the MVN Education Society and the best choice if you want to excel in your CBSE Board Exams and various Competitive Entrance Examinations.

reviews.author: Rohit Gulati
reviews.review_body: Unequivocally, my wife and I made the correct choice when we selected MVN  School. The way the teachers have helped our son develop his individuality, 	while at the same time emphasizing self-discipline and respect towards others, 	has truly been a heartening experience.

reviews.author: Anshikha Julka
reviews.review_body:
It is wonderful to see my daughter Laavanya grow from a bud to a flower. Modern Vidya Niketan School has helped in developing her character, talents and various skills.She scored 97.6% in her board exam which was remarkable. I am very happy and grateful to MVN for playing a vital role in my daughter’s transformation.
With teacher's guidance, my daughter has developed into a confident and capable child. Thank you for being such an important part in my child’s development.
